calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Mar-02-2009 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Mar-02-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Court Trial/Settlement Conference. Commissioner William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Lois Jones, CSR #3689.

Elizabeth McDonald, Esq. appeared for plaintiff US Bank Natinoal Association, as Trustee for Master Asset Backed Securities Trust.
Michael McCloskey, Esq. appeared for defendant Rick Fairley, who was not present at today's hearing.
Notice of Time and Place of Trial was filed on February 13, 2009.

Terms of the Settlement Agreement were read into the record by Ms. McDonald. In accordance with the agreement reached by counsel, defendant Rick Fairley shall vacate the subject premises located at 51 St. Charles Avenue, San Francisco, 94132 no later than May 4, 2009. Plaintiff is entitled to restitution and possession of the subject premises. Plaintiff is not seeking monetary damages at this time.

If defendant Rich Fairley fails to vacate the subject premises as set forth above, judgment for plaintiff shall be entered without further notice, and a writ of possession shall issue. Ms. McDonald shall reduce the terms of the agreement to writing, and submit to counsel for defendant no later than March 16, 2009. Counsel for defendant shall sign-off on the agreement not later than March 31, 2009.

Agreement of counsel was accepted by the Court.
